_note: The DISPUTED Nabataean link. Herod's mother Cypros was a Nabataean; the Nabataeans were traditionally traced to Nebaioth, Ishmael's firstborn. Unlike Esau=Edom (which Genesis 36 states outright), the Nabataean=Nebaioth identification is contested by scholars, so this whole link is flagged. If accepted, BOTH of Herod's parents descend from Abraham: his father through Esau, his mother through Ishmael. NEBAIOTH exists (07b), CYPROSNAB exists (07).

c.400 BC · the Nabataeans (Arabs of Petra), traditionally traced to Nebaioth, Ishmael's firstborn
